No campaigns found for the selected date range.
Data source: PostgreSQL (read-only) google_ads.campaign_performance joined to google_ads.campaigns, filtered to account_id = 9031058245 (ledsone.de) and group_name = 'Thasi' — the explicit internal campaign-ownership field synced from Google Ads.
Latest available data: 2026-07-13 · Full data range available: 2026-04-20 to 2026-07-13 · Refresh status: re-pulled fresh from PostgreSQL at build time; synced hourly from Google Ads via the existing AIOS pipeline. This page is a static snapshot, not a live query.
Why numbers may differ slightly from the Google Ads UI: Google Ads revises conversion values retroactively for days/weeks after the click as attribution data is finalised (delayed and cross-device attribution). Our hourly sync captures a point-in-time snapshot — the most recent 1–7 days are the most likely to still be revised upward by Google after this page was built. Cost and Impressions/Clicks/CTR are not affected by this lag; only Conversion Value and ROAS on recent days may shift.
Requirement 2

PMax Product Zero-Performance & Root-Cause

Google Ads · LEDSone DE · Product-level · Last 30 Days
Reporting window: trailing 30 days
Products
–
🔵 New + 0 Imp
–
🚨 0 Impressions
–
🚨 0 Clicks
–
🚨 0 Conv (30d)
–
🟢 Healthy
–
Zero-Flag Logic (30-day window)
🔵 New + 0 Imp Days Live ≤ 30 AND Impressions = 0 🚨 0 Impressions Days Live > 30 AND Impressions = 0 🚨 0 Clicks Impressions > 0 AND Clicks = 0 🚨 0 Conv (30d) Clicks > 0 AND Spend > 0 AND Conversions = 0 🟢 Healthy Impressions > 0 AND Clicks > 0 AND Conversions > 0
Title Item ID Stock Campaign Budget Date Added Days Live Impressions Clicks CTR Avg CPC Cost Conv. Value Conv. Conv. Rate ROAS GMC Status Stock Status 🚨 Zero Flag Action
No products found for the selected filters.
Data source: PostgreSQL (read-only) google_ads.product_performance (campaign × product daily granularity for PMax) joined to google_ads.merchant_products (title/image/link/availability) and filtered to Thasitha's two PMax campaigns on account_id = 9031058245 (ledsone.de, group_name = 'Thasi'): Pmax | Thasi | Shoptimised | THT | NewProduct | MCV -20/04 and Pmax | Thasi | Shoptimised | MT | Metal Product | MCV -27/04.
Date Added to Campaign / Days Live: earliest date the product appears in product_performance for that campaign (proxy for listing-group inclusion date — not a literal Google Ads "date added" timestamp, which the API does not expose per product).
Product Title / Image / Link: primary source is merchant_products (470 of 831 rows, 57%). Falls back to listings.shopify_listings.main_image_url/title/listing_url (site = Germany, including parent-product rows, not just sellable-variant rows) for the rest — recovers 356 more rows, bringing total coverage to 826 of 831 (99.4%). The final 5 rows (0.6%) have no image/title in any source — confirmed genuinely orphaned: zero rows in both the Merchant Center feed and the current Shopify catalogue, very low historical activity (2–15 impressions, 0 clicks each), likely deleted/archived variants that Google Ads still retains trailing performance data for.
Shopify Stock Status: sourced from merchant_products.availability (the Merchant Center feed's availability field, itself synced from Shopify). Shown as Unknown for rows with no Merchant Center feed match — independent of the Shopify-listings image fallback above.
⚠ GMC Status is a DATA-QUALITY PROXY, not the real Google Merchant Center verdict. The actual GMC approval/eligibility status (Approved/Disapproved/Under Review) does not exist anywhere in this database — confirmed via live schema check across all 77 tables. What's shown instead is a manual check of whether each product's merchant_products feed row has Google's commonly-required fields present: Title, Landing Page Link, Image, Price, Availability, an Identifier (GTIN/MPN/Brand), and Description. ✓ Data Check: Approved = all these fields are present (does not guarantee real GMC approval — landing-page mismatches, image quality, and policy violations are invisible to this check). ✗ Data Check: Not Approved = lists exactly which required field(s) are missing. Not in Merchant Center Feed = this product has Google Ads performance history but no matching row in the feed at all, so it cannot be approved regardless of field completeness. Populating the real GMC status would require a new sync job against the Content API's productstatuses endpoint, which does not currently exist in the AIOS pipeline.
Stock Inventory = live numeric quantity from listings.shopify_listings.quantity (site = Germany), joined on the same product/variant ID used throughout this table. Shown as N/A for the ~2% of rows with no Shopify listing match.
Budget (€/day) = the campaign's daily budget from google_ads.campaigns.budget (THT NewProduct = €5.00/day, MT Metal Product = €12.00/day, at time of report generation).
CTR %, Avg CPC, Conversion Rate, ROAS (%) are calculated directly from the same 30-day aggregate metrics already shown (Impressions, Clicks, Cost, Conversion Value) — not pre-averaged daily figures. CTR = Clicks ÷ Impressions; Avg CPC = Cost ÷ Clicks; Conversion Rate = Conversions ÷ Clicks; ROAS = Conversion Value ÷ Cost. Shown as N/A where the denominator is zero (e.g. no clicks yet).
Action: left blank per instruction — for manual entry.
Requirement 3

Campaign Product Overlap & Auction Conflict

Overall Google Ads Campaigns · LEDSone DE
SKUs from Thasitha's two PMax campaigns, cross-checked against every ledsone.de campaign · date range defaults to campaign start (2026-04-20) through today
Overlapping SKUs
–

–

Data Check Required
–

Defaults to campaign start (2026-04-20) through today — Baseline/Inflated CPC, inflation %, risk, and Overlap Data all recompute live for whatever range you pick.
Auction Conflict Risk (Est. CPC Inflation = ((Inflated CPC / Baseline CPC) − 1) × 100)
CRITICAL 30%+ Inflation HIGH 15% – 30% Inflation MODERATE 5% – 15% Inflation LOW 0% – 5% Inflation CPC DEFLATION Negative inflation DATA CHECK REQUIRED Baseline/Inflated CPC unavailable NO OVERLAP in Thasitha's scope, but no other campaign currently active for this SKU
ID Name Camp. 1 Camp. 2 Camp. 3 Camp. 4 Base CPC Infl. CPC CPC Infl. Risk Overlap Data Action
No current campaign overlaps found for the selected filters.
Overlap definition used: a SKU (Google Ads product_item_id) counts as overlapping only when it has performance history in Thasitha's PMax campaign(s) and at least one other (non-Thasitha) ledsone.de campaign, per google_ads.product_performance — restricted to campaigns with campaign_status = ENABLED only, on both sides. SKUs that only run in Thasitha's own two campaigns (no external overlap at all) are shown with a "NO OVERLAP" status and blank Campaign 2+/CPC/Overlap Data/Action fields — use the Overlap Status filter above to show only currently-overlapping SKUs, only no-overlap SKUs, or both (default). Paused and removed campaigns are excluded entirely, both from the overlap count and from Campaign 1/2/3/4/+more — a SKU that only historically overlapped with a now-paused/removed campaign will not appear here or will show fewer campaigns than an all-time view would. This still isn't a strictly "currently assigned/eligible" feed (no such per-product source exists for PMax in this database, documented in evidence/thasitha/2026-07-15_requirement-3-discovery.md) — it means "has recorded performance while the campaign is active," which is the closest available proxy for a live auction conflict.
Campaign 1 is Thasitha's own campaign for that SKU (highest-cost one, if the SKU is in both her campaigns). Campaign 2/3/4/+more are every other, currently-ENABLED campaign (any owner) that has served that same SKU.
Baseline CPC = Campaign 1's aggregate CPC (total cost ÷ total clicks) within the selected date range above. Inflated CPC = the combined aggregate CPC of all other overlapping campaigns together (total cost ÷ total clicks across Campaign 2+) within that same range. Everything on this page — Baseline/Inflated CPC, inflation %, risk, Overlap Data, KEEP/REMOVE action — recomputes live in your browser the moment you change the date range, no page reload.
Currently active only: an external (non-Thasitha) campaign only counts toward overlap if it has actually shown an impression on 2026-07-15 or 2026-07-16 (the latest available Ads data) — not just "had some cost/clicks somewhere in the selected range." A campaign that went quiet weeks ago no longer counts, even if the date range covers a period when it was active. Each Campaign 2+/3/4 card shows its exact last-active date so you can verify this yourself.
Est. CPC Inflation = ((Inflated CPC ÷ Baseline CPC) − 1) × 100 — the standard formula. A positive value means the other overlapping campaigns' combined CPC is higher relative to Campaign 1's baseline; a negative value is shown as CPC Deflation.
Overlap Campaign-wise Data lists every campaign that has served the SKU (Campaign 1, 2, 3, and beyond) with that campaign's own Conversion Value, ROAS, Cost, and Conversions — all campaigns are always shown here, never truncated, even when more than three exist (see the expandable +more panel for full metrics).
Action recommends keeping the SKU in whichever campaign (among all listed, not just the first three shown) has the highest Conversion Value within the selected date range, tie-broken by ROAS, then conversions, then lower cost. A SKU only gets a KEEP/REMOVE recommendation if it still qualifies (has activity in both her own campaign and an external one) within the chosen range — otherwise it drops out of the table entirely, or shows "Business Review Required" when evidence is too thin to declare a winner. This is advisory only — recommendations are based on available product-level performance in the selected range and require PPC review before any campaign changes. Nothing on this page is executed automatically.
Data source: PostgreSQL (read-only) google_ads.product_performance (active/ENABLED campaigns only, all ledsone.de) joined to google_ads.campaigns, google_ads.merchant_products, and listings.shopify_listings (fallback, including parent-product rows). With the default date range (campaign start through today), 75 SKUs qualify as currently-overlapping — lower than an unbounded all-time count (231) because it only counts overlap that occurred during Thasitha's own campaign lifetime, not historical overlap from before her campaign started. Changing the date range recalculates this count live.
Requirement 4

Shopify Sales vs Google Ads Conversion Value

SKU-Level Sold Count & Value Comparison · LEDSone DE
Fixed periods: past 30 / 60 / 90 days (common end date 2026-07-16) · plus a Custom Range you choose below
Data freshness: pulled live from PostgreSQL on 2026-07-16. Shopify latest order date 2026-07-16; Google Ads latest performance date 2026-07-15.
Total SKUs
–
Sold Count (30d)
–
Sales Value (30d)
–
Conv. Value (30d)
–
Difference (30d)
–
Column Legend (applies to every period block)
Sold = units sold on Shopify (quantity, not order count) Sales Value = € revenue from those Shopify units Conv. Value = € conversion value Google Ads attributes to the SKU Diff = Sales Value − Conv. Value
SKU Product Price 30 Days 60 Days 90 Days Custom Range
SoldSales €Conv. €Diff SoldSales €Conv. €Diff SoldSales €Conv. €Diff SoldSales €Conv. €Diff
No SKUs found for the selected filters.
Business question: for each SKU in Thasitha's Google Ads scope, how many units were sold on Shopify, what Shopify sales value and Google Ads conversion value resulted, and the difference between the two — since her campaigns started (2026-04-20) through today, and for any custom date range you choose, plus which campaign(s) contain that SKU.
SKU scope: the same 572 unique product SKUs from Requirement 2/3 — every product with performance history in Thasitha's two PMax campaigns (account_id = 9031058245, campaigns Pmax | Thasi | Shoptimised | THT | NewProduct | MCV -20/04 and Pmax | Thasi | Shoptimised | MT | Metal Product | MCV -27/04), campaign_status = ENABLED only.
Sold Count = SUM(item_quantity) from order_management.order_item_info joined to order_management.orders, filtered to the ledsone-de Shopify store (sub_source_id = 108), excluding orders with status of Cancelled or Deleted. This is units sold, not distinct order count.
Sales Value = SUM(item_price × item_quantity) from the same filtered Shopify line items, in €.
Conv. Value = SUM(conversion_value) from google_ads.product_performance for Thasitha's two ENABLED campaigns, in €. Not confirmed to be purchase-only — no conversion-action breakdown exists anywhere in this database to verify that, so it may include other configured conversion goals for this account.
Custom Range is computed live in your browser from the same underlying daily data as the fixed periods — pick any Start/End date above and every period column recalculates instantly, no page reload.
SKU/Offer ID resolution: Google Ads' product_item_id for most SKUs in this scope is a numeric Shopify listing ID, not a literal SKU string — resolved via listings.shopify_listings.item_id to the real SKU (99.1% resolved, 5 SKUs unresolved, same 5 orphaned rows documented in Requirement 2).
Selling Price = current google_ads.merchant_products.price, falling back to listings.shopify_listings.price (Germany site, listable variant). Shown as N/A for SKUs with no price in either source.
Note: Shopify sales value and Google Ads conversion value may differ because they use different attribution and recording methods. Differences require review and do not automatically indicate incorrect tracking.
Known limitations: the Shopify valid-order status filter and the Ads purchase-conversion definition are both working defaults pending explicit business sign-off (see evidence/thasitha/requirement-4-order-definition.md). Selling Price reflects current price, not the historical order-line price. CSV export is not included — no existing reusable export pattern was found elsewhere in this project to reuse safely.
Requirement 5

Multichannel SKU Sales — Current Year vs Previous Year

Shopify · eBay · 30/60/90-Day Comparison · LEDSone DE
Common end date: 2026-07-15 · Previous-year end date: 2025-07-15 (exact calendar shift)
Data freshness: pulled live from PostgreSQL on 2026-07-16. Shopify and eBay both have continuous live data through 2026-07-16. Amazon is excluded from this build — the Amazon Germany account's order sync stopped in 2023-04-19 and has zero data for either the current-year or previous-year comparison periods, confirmed live (0 rows from 2025-01-01 onward). Including it would only ever show empty cells.
SKU scope: every SKU (1,865 total) with at least one valid Shopify or eBay order (ledsone.de / ledsonede, Germany) in the current 90-day window (2026-04-17 to 2026-07-16) or the equivalent previous-year 90-day window (2025-04-17 to 2025-07-16) — this is the practical "all ledsone.de products" scope: the full catalog minus SKUs with zero activity in any of these periods.
Rolling windows — do not add them up: the 60-day figure already includes the latest 30 days, and the 90-day figure already includes the latest 60 days. 30d + 60d + 90d is not a valid grand total.
Total SKUs
–

–

–

Trend Status Legend (based on the 30-day comparison)
GROWING Current > Previous Year DECLINING Current < Previous Year STABLE Current = Previous Year NEW GROWTH Previous Year = 0, Current > 0 NO SALES both years = 0 DATA CHECK mapping/source unavailable
SKU Product Price Current Year Previous Year Comparison (30d)
Shop 30d eBay 30d Shop 60d eBay 60d Shop 90d eBay 90d Shop 30d eBay 30d Shop 60d eBay 60d Shop 90d eBay 90d Diff Change % Trend
No SKUs found for the selected filters.
Business question: for each SKU, how many units sold through Shopify and eBay during the latest 30/60/90-day periods this year, and how does that compare with the equivalent periods last year.
Metric: units sold (SUM(item_quantity)), not distinct order count — matches Requirement 4's convention.
Channels: Shopify (sub_source_id=108, ledsone-de) and eBay (sub_source_id=27, ledsonede) only. Amazon excluded — no synced data since 2023-04-19 (see data-freshness note above).
Valid orders: status NOT IN ('Cancelled','Deleted') — same convention as Requirement 4. This is a working default, not yet a company-signed-off rule for eBay specifically.
Date windows — Current: 30d = 2026-06-16 to 2026-07-15, 60d = 2026-05-17 to 2026-07-15, 90d = 2026-04-17 to 2026-07-15. Previous Year (exact calendar shift, not month-aligned): 30d = 2025-06-16 to 2025-07-15, 60d = 2025-05-17 to 2025-07-15, 90d = 2025-04-17 to 2025-07-15.
YoY Change %: New Growth is shown (not Infinity) when Previous Year = 0 and Current > 0. No Change is shown when both years = 0.
Selling Price = current google_ads.merchant_products.price, falling back to listings.shopify_listings.price (Germany, listable variant). 1,490 of 1,865 SKUs (79.9%) resolved a title/price — the rest are SKUs with real sales history but no matching product feed/listing record (shown as N/A), most likely discontinued or unlisted products.
Known limitations: Amazon excluded entirely (stale sync). eBay order-validity rule (which statuses count) reuses Shopify's convention from Requirement 4, not yet separately confirmed for eBay. No distinct-order-vs-unit confirmation was obtained specifically for eBay before building — flagged as a working assumption, not a company-approved rule.
